title: test

steps.text: mettre les outils sur la table

genText:
I. preparation tools  
1. Place the tools on the table (see photo)  

II. testing  
1. Ensure the equipment is set up correctly.  
2. Power on the machinery and verify functionality.  

III. assembly  
1. Gather all components required for assembly.  
2. Follow assembly diagram to connect parts securely.  
3. Conduct a thorough inspection to ensure quality standards are met.  
4. Document any issues encountered during assembly.
